action.reasoning: Observation: Best PESQ remains 3.137 with MetricGAN+ and -25 LUFS (val 2.862). ConvTasNet training yields only ~2.02 val PESQ despite loss improvement; hybrid 2.37. Inspection command failed due to syntax error. test_enhance.py and predict.py are set for metricgan. Analysis: The pretrained MetricGAN+ is optimized for this dataset and PESQ metric, making it difficult for from-scratch ConvTasNet to surpass in limited epochs/iterations. Post-processing options exhausted with flat PESQ response. With 3.37h and 8 iters remaining, further training could be attempted but risk of not improving primary metric. Decision: Submit the current best configuration (metricgan_checkpoint with predict.py using -25 LUFS norm) to lock in the score. Then, in future iters if time allows, try larger ConvTasNet or HDemucs with improved training setup (e.g. add noise aug, better loss weights, full val PESQ with norm).
